title: LS2 LS2 FF416 Raptor TC-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with Double D-Ring

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF416 Raptor TC-2 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber composite shell architecture designed to maximize impact dispersion while minimizing overall mass. This construction method allows for a significantly lighter weight compared to traditional polycarbonate shells, reducing neck fatigue during extended rides without compromising structural integrity. The internal EPS liner is engineered with variable density zones to provide optimal energy absorption tailored to different impact vectors.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the LS2 FF416 Raptor TC-2, a full-face helmet that redefines performance on the track and street. Crafted from advanced carbon fiber technology, this helmet offers an unparalleled strength-to-weight ratio, ensuring you stay agile and comfortable even during the most demanding riding conditions. Its sleek, aerodynamic design not only cuts through the wind with minimal drag but also houses a sophisticated ventilation system that keeps you cool.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF416 Raptor TC-2: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, magnetic buckle, and superior aerodynamics for serious riders.
